nasb.text: Behold, You desire truth in the innermost being, And in the hidden part You will make me know wisdom.

esv.text: Behold, you delight in truth in the inward being, and you teach me wisdom in the secret heart.

cnv.text: 看哪！你喜愛的是內心的誠實； 在我內心的隱密處，你使我得智慧。

ccb.text: 你所喜爱的是内心的诚实， 求你使我内心有智慧。

csbs.text: 看哪，你喜悦内心深处的诚实， 你使我在内心的隐秘处明白智慧！
